feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: But I'll take that chance if you take my hand
entry.summary:
Author: HeartWizard90

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,992Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: He’s regretting his choice of only one drink at the moment, the inside of his mouth going dry with nerves. Eddie tries to say something to him, probably an encouragement to join. He doesn’t realize what’s about to happen, until Eddie pulls him closer. Suddenly Eddie’s face is practically in the nook of Buck’s neck. His breath hot on Buck’s already burning skin, he grasps for anything to steady himself - the feeling of Eddie’s denim jacket between his fingers. The only thing truly keeping him up is his own will power - that feels almost like ash or soot under his feet. “Just copy what I’m doing,” His voice is lower then it had been, directly into his ear. “You have too much faith in me,” Buck finds himself laughing. - OR; Buck isn't his usual excited self when the 118 suggests going line dancing after shift, only convinced by Eddie's sudden excitement at the idea. He finds himself enjoying the night far more then he expected.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Being himself
entry.summary:
Author: Poetryobsessedbi

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,414Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 748

Summary: Buck realises that he and Abby will never work out. So as a celebration/solo pity party for himself he goes to the one place that he can completely be himself. It's a small bar, run by his friend justin, that caters to veterans, but especially the ones of the queer variety. When a handsome stranger, who turns out to be a probationary firefighter walks in, it feels like his luck might have turned after all.Or; What if Buck and Eddie met in a bar for queer vets? what if they felt free enough to be themselves, because they knew the other would understand? What if, instead of falling in an instant friendship after the fated grenade in leg, they fell together earlier, in a whole different way? Feat. Buck being a Navy SEAL, Eddie being less repressed, falling in love and finding a family

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I Will Cross Universes for You
entry.summary:
Author: NyotaGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,879Chapters: 4/10Kudos: 21

Summary: "He wasn't me. How..." Buck's voice cracks, and the sound cuts through Eddie like a knife. "...how could you not see that?" And the tears finally fall, and all Eddie wants is to wrap him in his arms and hold him until they melt into one, until he can ease some of Buck's pain. Pain that he caused. He can only hang how head in shame, ignoring the way his own heart breaks because he should have known better. He should have... OR Buck has an evil doppelganger OR In which Buck's evil 'twin' kidnaps Buck and takes his place and Eddie and the rest of the 118 are none the wiser. In their defense, how could they have known that alternate universes existed?

entry.title: just keep swimming (hoping)
entry.summary:
Author: lous_sunfl0wer

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,355Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 575

Summary: Eddie and Buck have been married for years, after a chance meeting during Eddie's second deployment. After he applied for the fire academy, Buck had to go overseas one last time. But he goes missing during a mission and after almost a year, Eddie is close to giving up hope. Oh, and he accidentally never told his colleagues about his husband.

entry.title: Overflood Me
entry.summary:
Author: PineWitch

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,175Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 75

Summary: Buck is used to pain – physical, constant and familiar enough to ignore. It’s just another thing he pushes through on long shifts at the station, even when it gets worse for no clear reason.But ignoring pain is easy compared to ignoring Eddie. Between unspoken tension, stolen touches, and something neither of them has named yet, Buck finds himself unraveling in the quiet hours of a 24-hour shift. And when Eddie finally stops waiting for him to say it first, there’s no room left for pretending this is just friendship anymore.Or, what starts with hands on Buck’s aching leg turns into something far more dangerous than pain management.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Buck's Shot
entry.summary:
Author: TheGreenestBean

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,114Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: “Is everything okay?” Eddie asked as soon as the door shut behind them. “I… I need to go to Canada. There’s been a massive avalanche, patrol need the help and they’ve asked me to come back for a bit.” Buck explained. Eddie cocked his head at him in confusion, “But they’ve got plenty of patrollers already, why would they need to bring you all the way from California to help out because of an avalanche?” It wasn’t malicious, Eddie was merely confused. Buck sighed, leaning back against the wall and crossing his arms, “There were a lot of patrollers on the hill evacuating it when it hit, 50% of them haven’t checked in with dispatch. For a size 3 they’d already be calling in reinforcements but with half of the team missing they’re desperate for help, especially help that knows the resort. I have to go Eddie, but I don’t want to say yes unless I have your support.” or Following a massive avalanche Buck gets called back to a job he left years ago.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Survivor
entry.summary:
Author: JackWritesBack

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,022Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: Eddie isn’t looking at him. Eddie is actually staring into the floor with an unparalleled intensity. There may also be tears in his eyes but everything’s blurry to Buck right now. He can see clearly enough that Eddie’s good hand is balled tight in a fist. He thinks that maybe Eddie won’t acknowledge or respond to him. He thinks that maybe this is it, they’re done. He wonders if Eddie is going to throw a punch at him. Eddie is, after all, a fighting man. - - - Based on S4E14. After Eddie underscores the importance of Buck in his life, Buck confesses his true feelings and makes a bid for his best friend’s heart. One-shot told over three days.

entry.title: Where Sirens Collide
entry.summary:
Author: bucknroll

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,453Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Buck and Eddie met on a rainy Tuesday afternoon, on the 15th of December 2025. It was on the site of a little car accident, but the person who crashed into their person blamed them, and before you knew it the police were there and they were both in hand cuffs. Eddie keeps busy, cleaning up the mess from the car, but when Eddie looks up from what he is doing he is greeted with the most gorgeous face he has ever seen. Beautiful blue eyes, blonde curls, a bruise or even a birthmark, and god the muscles. Or- Eddie falls first, and Buck falls harder.

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 189,300Chapters: 39/?Kudos: 102

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: lemonade, steaks, and sourdough bread
entry.summary:
Author: andallofmyheart

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,862Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 170

Summary: “You don’t cook cauliflower anymore, Buck.” Eddie says, breathless.Buck has a bewildered expression, but answers still, calmly, “You don’t like cauliflower, Eddie.”“Yeah, but most people do. Your sister and Chimney loved that dish.”Buck blushes slightly, almost unnoticeable with the afternoon sun shining brightly into the kitchen and into Eddie’s eyes.He shrugs slightly, and replies “Well, I don’t cook for them much.” or: evan buckley proves he loves eddie diaz over and over again until eddie opens his eyes, and his mouth

entry.title: Learning To Stay
entry.summary:
Author: FandomWork101

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,633Chapters: 28/?Kudos: 366

Summary: Buck knows the 118 is his family. They have been with him through so much. But when everyone goes home, it is Buck left by himself. Buck decides he wants to change that. He decides that he wants to create his own family. One that doesn’t leave. One that stays. So Buck adopts a dog. But that leads to some jealousy from the Diaz family as they feel this dog is taking all of Buck’s time.

entry.title: A Lesson in Gaslighting
entry.summary:
Author: MultiFandomElla

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,947Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 40

Summary: Buck: Were you aware that everyone has a gc without us?Eddie: Must be real silent without you on there. Is that really what you needed to talk to me about?Buck: Eddie. Its a gc where they talk about us.Eddie: How did you find out about this?Buck: …Eddie: Buck Buckley.Buck: Oh shit. Full name. or Buddie find out that everyone is betting on when they will get together, so they decide to have their own fun.

entry.title: Buprenorphine and Pink Brandywines
entry.summary:
Author: pyrolysis (bertrandsbakingchannel)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,993Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 56

Summary: Eddie Diaz doesn’t remember most of his life going by. Buck’s been talking about it lately (when he actually talks to Eddie about things that matters), about how fast they’re getting older. Eddie isn’t sure he’s ready to be satisfied with what he’s done with life. Eddie isn’t sure he’s done everything he wants to yet, but maybe he should try to.   Eddie trying to do things that make him happy, but he sucks at it. Or, how Eddie Diaz mistakes chest pain for happiness.

entry.title: gracias a la vida
entry.summary:
Author: mielydrama

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,182Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 86

Summary: The slow fall into knowing you're in love with your best friend and asking him to kiss you can happen in a few minutes, on a slow and quiet Sunday. Eddie thinks about how he's made of everyone has ever loved him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: N
entry.summary:
Author: Lucid

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,250Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 40

Summary: Eddie's parents have his soulmark illegally removed and replaced as a baby. The soulmark removal effects not just Eddie, but his soulmate as well. But soulmates aren't so easily erased, and the truth was destined to come out eventually.
